@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cilium-9207-differentiate-between-udp-and-tcp-services",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cilium: Differentiate between UDP and TCP services",
+    "description": "Differentiate between UDP and TCP services. Requested by 30+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cilium deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cilium version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nhelm list -n cilium 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cilium installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cilium configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium\n```\nCurrently, we do not differentiate between UDP and TCP services both in the BPF datapath and cilium-agent which means that services of different L4 protocols with the same port number cannot co-exist."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Differentiate between UDP and TCP services",
+        "description": "Saving protocol information in the lb(x)_key in bpf, as well as\nadding protocol information to service maps creation in the\nlbmap package ensures that translation, receiving, and forwarding\nwill always take the protocol into proper account.\n```yaml\nCilium will show it as a single service:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Differentiate between UDP and TCP services\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Saving protocol information in the lb(x)_key in bpf, as well as\nadding protocol information to service maps creation in the\nlbmap package ensures that translation, receiving, and forwarding\nwill always take the protocol into proper account.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Cilium will show it as a single service:",
+        "While k8s will distinguish TCP and UDP:",
+        "CT entries are still referencing the no proto (rev nat ID `6`) service:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cilium",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cilium"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "expert",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cilium/cilium/issues/9207",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cilium/cilium",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/cilium/cilium/pull/12628"
+    },
+    "reactions": 30,
+    "comments": 45,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cilium installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:38:45.453Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cilium-9207-differentiate-between-udp-and-tcp-services",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cilium: Differentiate between UDP and TCP services",
+    "description": "Differentiate between UDP and TCP services. Requested by 30+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cilium deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cilium version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nhelm list -n cilium 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cilium installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cilium configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium\n```\nCurrently, we do not differentiate between UDP and TCP services both in the BPF datapath and cilium-agent which means that services of different L4 protocols with the same port number cannot co-exist."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Differentiate between UDP and TCP services",
+        "description": "Saving protocol information in the lb(x)_key in bpf, as well as\nadding protocol information to service maps creation in the\nlbmap package ensures that translation, receiving, and forwarding\nwill always take the protocol into proper account.\n\nFixes: #9207\n```yaml\nCilium will show it as a single service:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Differentiate between UDP and TCP services\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Saving protocol information in the lb(x)_key in bpf, as well as\nadding protocol information to service maps creation in the\nlbmap package ensures that translation, receiving, and forwarding\nwill always take the protocol into proper account.\n\nFixes: #9207",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Cilium will show it as a single service:",
+        "While k8s will distinguish TCP and UDP:",
+        "If we connect to both listeners, we'll end up with 4 different CT entries, for both TCP and UDP, with the same revnat ID (`6`):"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
